content.text: Condition absorber and DoT applicator. Every ability has a tangible cost — Toxicity, HP, or carrying conditions that hurt you. Abilities complement the augment system's Absorb/Redirect cycle.

Burden Sense (Passive): You can see active conditions on any creature within Medium range — colored auras, dark threads, pulsing marks. You always know who's suffering and what from. Your Interface checks against enemies you've scanned gain +1.

Empathic Touch (Active, 1 AP): [Martyr] Touch an ally within Close range. Reduce one condition on them by 1 stack (Bleed 3 → Bleed 2, Poison 2 → Poison 1). Doesn't transfer to you — just reduces it. +1 Toxicity. The entry-level heal — cheaper than full Absorb but still costs Toxicity.
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: Your Absorb and Empathic Touch don't provoke opportunity attacks. Walk in, pull conditions, walk out.
An ally within Close range gains +2 to resist the next condition applied to them. +1 Toxicity. Preventative medicine.
Allies within Close range are immune to fear and panic effects. Your presence stabilizes.
Your next melee weapon attack this turn applies Poison 1 on hit in addition to normal weapon damage. +1 Toxicity. Your weapon carries your contamination.
Close range, Interface check vs Grit. Apply Bleed 1d4 to target (1d4 damage/round for 2 rounds). +1 Toxicity. Direct DoT application.
At the start of your turn, reduce one condition you're carrying by 1 stack automatically. Your body processes suffering faster. Free.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: When you Absorb from an ally, that ally gains +1 to their next check. Your touch encourages.
Spend up to 5 of your own HP to heal an ally within Close range for the same amount +2. No Toxicity cost — just blood.
Choose one condition type permanently (Poison, Bleed, Stun, Hex, Corrode, Burn). You are immune to it. Can only be taken once. Your body has adapted.
Carry up to 5 conditions before overload penalties (normally 3 with Pain Threshold). Extraordinary capacity.

Link to an ally within Medium range for 3 rounds. Any condition applied to them is automatically copied to you at half strength (no AP, no Absorb needed). +1 Toxicity per auto-absorb. You feel what they feel.

Your next melee weapon attack, if it hits, also applies one condition you're currently carrying to the target at full strength. The condition is removed from you. +1 Toxicity. Hit them with your suffering.

Choose an enemy within Medium range that has a DoT condition. Interface check (DC 7). On success, one adjacent enemy gains the same condition at half strength (round up). +1 Toxicity. Your infections spread.
Spend 2 Toxicity. An enemy within Medium range loses one active buff or positive condition. Interface check (DC 8). Strip their advantages.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: Remove one condition from ALL allies within Medium range. Conditions are destroyed, not transferred. +1 Toxicity per condition removed. Once per encounter.
Spend 4 Toxicity. An ally within Medium range heals for 2d6 + Interface bonus HP AND has one condition removed. The most efficient single-target heal in the game.

Absorb ALL conditions from ALL allies within Medium range. All absorbed conditions are immediately Redirected onto enemies of your choice (distribute as you wish). +1 Toxicity per condition processed. Once per encounter. The squad is cleansed, the enemies are buried.
All DoT conditions you apply (through any source — Afflict, Withering Touch, Purge Strike, Redirect, Venomous Intent) gain +1 stack. Bleed 1 becomes Bleed 2. Everything you touch rots faster.
When you Redirect a condition onto an enemy, all allies within Close range heal 1 HP. The cycle of suffering-to-healing runs automatically.
